title: Chile women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Chile women's national ice hockey team (Spanish: Selección femenina de hockey sobre hielo de Chile) is the national women's ice hockey team of Chile and is controlled by the Chilean Ice and Inline Hockey Federation. Chile is currently not ranked in the IIHF World Ranking and has not entered in any IIHF World Championship events.
text:
The Chile women's national ice hockey team (Spanish: Selección femenina de hockey sobre hielo de Chile) is the national women's ice hockey team of Chile and is controlled by the Chilean Ice and Inline Hockey Federation. Chile is currently not ranked in the IIHF World Ranking and has not entered in any IIHF World Championship events.

Players
Current squad
These players were called up for the 2024 Amerigol Latam Cup.

83 - Paula Cifuentes
